home.caption: Live, Study and Work Abroad
home.description_form: Fill out the form to analyze your profile and receive a free consultation with LatinAdvisor. You will know your visa requirements and the opportunities to reach this goal. During the free consultation, we will discuss your study options, travel and study costs and everything based on your specific personal goals and objectives.
home.description_option_1: After checking your profile, you will receive a link with an availability schedule to book your free consultation.
home.description_option_2: When you are ready to start this amazing journey, we will guide you step by step to choose your city, course, duration and start date — at no extra cost.
home.description_option_3: We will help you with everything, starting from school enrolment, visa documentation, course, visa and insurance payments, travel and accommodation assistance, job-search tips, and more.
home.description_option_4: In addition, you will be invited to all our events in Australia: study, recreational and migration events.

australia.description: Australia is one of the most popular destinations for international students seeking high-quality education, real job opportunities, and pathways to permanent migration. With vibrant coastal cities, a stable economy, and breathtaking natural landscapes, living in Australia is much more than an adventure — it’s an investment in your future.
australia.courses_title: Wide Range of Academic Programs in Australia
australia.courses_desc: Australia offers a diverse selection of high-quality academic programs tailored to your interests, goals, and English proficiency level:

course_1_child.list3: IELTS, Cambridge, and PTE Exam Preparation

courses.note: Note: An advanced, certified level of English is required for higher education programs.

australia.benefits_title: 5 Key Benefits of Studying in Australia
australia.benefits_list1_desc: With a student visa, you can work up to 24 hours per week while studying and full-time during holidays. This allows you to cover basic expenses, pay part of your tuition, and save during your stay.  Australia has strong demand in industries such as hospitality, culinary arts, childcare and aged care, IT, engineering, construction, education, and more.
australia.benefits_list2_desc: After completing your program, you may apply for a Postgraduate Visa or extend your stay if you secure an employer willing to sponsor you. There are real pathways to remain in Australia legally, and our registered migration agents will guide you every step of the way.
australia.benefits_list3_desc: Australia is home to internationally recognized English institutions and academic programs focused on practical and professional development, opening doors to global opportunities.
australia.benefits_list4_desc: Australia consistently ranks among the countries with the highest quality of life. Its healthcare system, safety, transportation, and stunning natural environments make it an ideal place to live and study.
australia.benefits_list5_ttl: 5. Travel with Your Partner or Family
australia.benefits_list5_desc: Some programs allow your partner to obtain a visa with work rights and even include your school-aged children.
australia.cities_title: Discover the Most Popular Cities for Students
australia.cities_desc1: Study in some of the most welcoming and sought-after cities for international students, including Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Adelaide, Gold Coast, Perth, and Byron Bay.
australia.cities_desc2: These cities offer a unique lifestyle, coastal living, ideal weather, excellent public transportation, and vibrant multicultural student communities.
australia.cities_desc3: Click on a city to learn more.
australia.requirements_title: Essential Requirements for Your Australian Student Visa
australia.requirements_desc: The Australian government continuously improves its visa process, focusing on applicants who demonstrate a genuine intention to study. Factors such as your age, academic and professional background, financial capacity, and the quality of the educational institution you choose will be assessed.
australia.requirements_list1_desc: You must be enrolled in a government-approved course (CRICOS) and receive your official Confirmation of Enrollment. This document is mandatory for your visa application.
australia.requirements_list2_desc: Provides medical assistance with coverage based on the plan you select.
australia.requirements_list3_desc: Allows you to demonstrate your genuine intention to stay in Australia temporarily as a student.
australia.requirements_list4_desc: Must be valid for at least 6 months.
australia.requirements_list5_desc: Depending on your country of origin and intended length of stay, the government may require medical exams before granting the visa.
australia.requirements_list6_desc: All documents must be translated into English.
australia.requirements_list7_desc: Depending on your nationality, you may need to demonstrate funds beyond tuition to support your stay in Australia. These funds only need to be available until your visa is approved — they are not an actual expense you must pay.
australia.requirements_list8_ttl: How much money do you need to show?
australia.requirements_list8_desc: Amounts vary based on the duration of your program:
australia.requirements_list9_desc:
✅ Bank statements (last 3 months), or
✅ A family sponsor who supports your expenses.
australia.desc_form: Complete these questions so we can evaluate your profile and provide personalized guidance based on your answers.

visarenewal.description: Renewing your student visa is the best option to stay and continue living your experience in a country full of opportunities. By extending your stay, you’ll be able to continue your studies, work legally up to 24 hours per week, strengthen your professional profile, and—most importantly—open the door to new migration opportunities.
visarenewal.courses_title: Courses You Can Use to Renew Your Student Visa
visarenewal.courses_desc: Renewing your visa is not just a formality—it’s an opportunity to choose the path that brings you closer to your goals. Now it’s about selecting the course that best matches your profile and objectives:
visarenewal.courses_1_desc: A great option for students who want to strengthen their language skills before moving on to vocational or university studies. You can renew your visa with courses such as:
visarenewal.courses_2_desc: Renewing your visa with a VET course is recommended for students with an intermediate to advanced level of English who want to specialize in a high-demand occupation in the Australian job market, with potential migration pathways.
visarenewal.courses_3_desc: You can choose between university degrees or master’s programs, all internationally recognized. If you have a high level of English, a master’s degree is an excellent option—not only does it enhance your academic and professional profile, but it can also open the door to better migration opportunities, including permanent residency.
visarenewal.demand_areas_desc1: Renewing your student visa doesn’t just mean continuing to work while you study—it can also be the first step toward future migration options if you choose areas with high demand in the country:
visarenewal.demand_areas_desc2: By renewing your student visa, you can choose a course that not only allows you to keep working but also brings you closer to permanent residency options in Australia. Our team will guide you in selecting the best pathway according to your goals.
visarenewal.agents_title: Book your free virtual or in-person consultation!

about_us.description1: We are an Australian company established in 2014 with the purpose of helping you achieve your dream of experiencing life in Australia. Can you imagine yourself on the other side of the world?
about_us.description2: Everyone in our team has had the opportunity to live this adventure, which means we truly understand what it feels like. That’s why we guide you like trusted friends, understanding your concerns, uncertainties, and any questions you may have. So don’t hesitate to get in touch.
about_us.description3: Our team of experts is committed to offering you the best advice, from choosing your destination and academic program to the visa process and adapting to your new home. With LatinAdvisor, you are not just choosing a service, but a reliable ally on your path to international success.

work_holiday.subtitle_caption: Requirements, benefits, and how to apply
work_holiday.description1: The Work and Holiday Visa Australia allows you to live, work, and travel in the country for up to 12 months. It is ideal for young people between 18 and 30 years old who want to combine adventure, learning, and international work experience.
work_holiday.description2: With this visa, you can immerse yourself in Australian culture, improve your English, and enjoy an unforgettable season surrounded by nature, beaches, modern cities, and people from all over the world.
work_holiday.benefits_title: Benefits of the Work and Holiday Visa in Australia

home.subtitle: Form Profile
home.description: Please complete these questions to analyze your profile and based on your responses, we will organise a personalised advisory consultation.
